{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "effat kuhtri/ jo tas KUNGS irr
juhs iſwehlejs/ ka jums buhs
winna Preeſcha ſtahweht win-
nam kalpoht/ un ka juhs win-
nam par Kalveem un Rwehpina-
tajeemi buhtat.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad zehlahs tee Lewiti/
Makats Amasaja Dehls/ un Jo-
els Asartja Dehls/ no to Raätite-
ru Behrneem. Un no Merara
Behrneem/ Kis Abda Dehls/ un
Asarijuß Jealeleëta Dehls. Un
no teem Gersoniteveem/ Jous
Simma Dehls/ un Edens Jou-
fa Dehls.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un no Elizawana Behr-
neemi/ Simrus un Jeiëls. Un
no Affawa Behrneem/ Saka-
rijus un Matantjus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un no Gemara Behr-
neem/ Jeiëls un Semejus. Un
no Jedutuna Behrneem/ Sema-
jus un Usiëls.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee tapulzinaja farws
Brahtus/ un ſwehtijahs/ un
nahze us ta Kehnita Pawehle-
ſchann/ pehz teem Wahrdeem ta
KUNGA ta KUNGA Namnu
ſchihſtiht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet tee Preesteri gahje
ta KUNGA Namna Eekſch-
puffë/ ka tee to ſchihſtitu/ un
isneffe no ta KUNGA Namna
Pagalinja wiſſu Neſchſihſtibu/
fo tee eekſch ta KUNGA ſwehta
Namna atradde/ un tee Lewi-
ti pazehſe tohs us ahru neſt Riḥ-
draza Uppë.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee fahze pirmã Deena
pirmã Mehneſi ſwehtiht/ un a-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "fiotã Mehnes Deenaã nah-
pee ta KUNGA Pagalmi-
ſwehtija ta KUNGA Na-
eekſch aſtonahm Deenahm
ſestapadeſmitã Deenaã ta p
Mehnes pabeidſe tee to.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Pehz nahze tee p
Kehnizu Iſkiju eekſcha/ un
zijs: Mehs effam wiſ-
KUNGA Namnu ſchihſti-
ir to Dedsamo-Uppuru Al-
un wiſſus winna Riḥkus/ t-
ſwehtu Maisu Galdu ar wi-
winna Riḥkeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ir wiſſus Riḥkus/ f-
Kehniſsch Akas/ famehr tas-
dija/ zaar ſaweem Grehkeer
atmettis/ effam mehs patai-
un ſivehtiſchi/ un rangi/ t-
preeſſch ta KUNGA Alta-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad zehlahs tas Kehn-
Iſkijuß agri/ un ſapulzin-
Pilsfahta Wirfneekue/ un
augſcha eekſch ta KUN-
Namma.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee atwedde ſept-
Wehrſchus/ un ſeptius
nus/ un ſeptius Jehrus/ un-
tius Raſlenus par Grehku-
puri preeſſch to Walſtibu-
preeſſch to ſwehtu Weetu-
preeſſch Juhtu. Un wiſſ-
zijs us Aaronu Behrneem
Preesteereeni/ ka teem bij tot-
ta KUNGA Altari uppure-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad nokawe tee
Wehrſchus/ un tee Preeste-
reine to Affini/ un flazz-
to us to Altari/ tee nokawe-
ridsan tohs Aunus/ un flazz-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
